---
title: "test_bridge_crucible.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/crucible/test_bridge_crucible.py"
loc: 46
complexity: 3
logic_score: 3.80
style_score: 3.78
intel_score: 8.36
overall_score: 6.58
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating TestBridgeCrucible, setUp.

## Interaction Protocol
Import TestBridgeCrucible and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.cstar.core.antigravity_bridge](file://src.cstar.core.antigravity_bridge)

### Exports
- `TestBridgeCrucible`
- `setUp`
- `test_fast_path_automation`
- `test_oracle_handshake_trigger`
- `test_json_scrubbing_fidelity`
